description: Morals: the lesson or takeaway of the story. Strings for single-word virtues, tuples for phrased morals.
morals: Being honest even when it's hard.
Following through on what you said you'd do.
Be kind, even when others aren't
being kind, even when others aren't
Choosing kindness regardless of how others behave.
It's okay to ask for help
Recognizing that no one has to do everything alone.
Growing stronger through errors and failures.
Treat others the way you want to be treated
Giving people the same respect you hope to receive.
Slow and steady wins the race
Proving yourself through deeds, not promises.
Being open to wisdom from others.
Embracing who you are without pretense.
Doing things the right way even when it's harder.
True friends are worth more than treasure
Valuing the people who stand by you.
Using your voice when silence would be easier.
Even the smallest person can make a big difference
making a difference, no matter your size
Size and status don't determine impact.
Every person carrying a unique gift.
Discovering courage you didn't know you had.
Big things can come from small beginnings
big things coming from small beginnings
Great results growing from humble starts.
Giving full effort regardless of outcome.
Be brave enough to try something new
being brave enough to try something new
Stepping into the unknown with open arms.
Fear is natural and doesn't mean weakness.
Failing doesn't make you a failure
Mistakes are steps on the road to success.
Change can be a good thing
It's okay to feel sad sometimes
All feelings are valid, even the hard ones.
Words can hurt, so choose them carefully
Language carrying real power to harm or heal.
A little help goes a long way
how a little help goes a long way
Small acts of assistance creating big impact.
Sometimes letting go is the bravest thing
having the courage to let go
Release being an act of strength, not surrender.
You don't have to be perfect to be good
Just because something is hard doesn't mean it's not worth doing
doing hard things that are worth it
Difficulty and value often going hand in hand.
The quietest voice can have the most to say
Soft words sometimes carrying the deepest truth.
Take care of the world around you
Stewardship of the environment and community.
What makes you different makes you strong
Uniqueness as a source of power.
Being sorry means trying to do better
God loves you just the way you are
Remember to ask God for help
Turning to God in times of need.
All things are possible with God
Faith opening doors that seem closed.
God has a plan, even when we can't see it
Trusting in a purpose beyond our understanding.
Extending to others the care you give yourself.
God gives us strength when we feel weak
Be thankful for what God has given you
God forgives us, so we should forgive others
Extending the mercy we ourselves receive.
You are never alone — God is always with you
Use the gifts God gave you to help others
Talents meant for service to others.
Trust in God, even when things are hard
God helps us when we don't feel worthy
God's help when we feel unworthy
Prayer can bring peace when you feel worried
Calm found through conversation with God.
Talk to God — He always listens
When you don't know what to do, pray about it
Thank God for the good things, even the small ones
Pray for others, not just yourself
Intercession as an act of love.
God hears every prayer, even the quiet ones
No prayer too small to reach divine ears.
